note: Human confirmed (ADR-0007 decision 5: the spec is the referee) coverage of the FROZEN spec invariants and boundary rules by the agent discovered replay suite (generated_specs/). Base adjudication is the 2026-07-03 semantic exploration survivors against specs/; INV-3 and INV-4 were re-adjudicated to full after the 2026-07-11 oracle closure, so this matrix reflects the committed suite as of 2026-07-11. Informational only: never gates, never moves the mutmut baseline. The gated number is the kill rate above.
source: human adjudication of semantic survivors vs specs/

legend.full: the discovered suite asserts this as the spec states it
legend.narrowed: asserted, but weaker than the spec (a defensible reason, but coverage shrank)
legend.reachability: an oracle exists but generation never reaches the triggering state (survives even at 6x budget)
legend.absent: no oracle in the discovered suite

invariants.note: closed 2026-07-11: the non-negativity check now asserts merchant, holds and platform_fees are all >= 0 once per example (external_settlement, the funding source, may go negative)

closed 2026-07-11: a once-per-example conservation oracle asserts the net delta across every account this run touched is zero, measured against a per-instance system-account baseline (safe on a shared server since examples run sequentially)

invariants.text: transitions only along the state table; nothing from VOIDED or REFUNDED
invariants.note: illegal-state rejection rules cover most transitions

invariants.text: preconditions enforced: illegal op returns 409, changes nothing
every AUTHORIZED+ intent has ≥ 1 ledger entry pair
invariants.note: no check that a ledger entry pair exists

boundary_rules.note: zero or negative amount never probed (survivor: allow-zero)
boundary where amount equals the fee never probed (survivor: fee-equal)
refund_over_limit_rejected exists; sequence unreached even at 6x budget (survivor: refund-cap-total)
the replay relation replays one endpoint only; no discovered relation crosses endpoints under a shared key (survivor: idempotency-cross-endpoint)
